rationale.R1.5: The agent proposed a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, reorganizing the original text into a conventional IMRaD-style flow.
rationale.RX.1: The output presented all claims as equally confident, without disclosing any uncertainty or limitations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covered exactly the agreed active set, addressing the task of restructuring the section flow.
rationale.RX.4: The output did not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content, and maintained the original meaning and tone.
rationale.RX.5: The output blended sources without traceability, failing to provide annotations for non-cosmetic changes.
